steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to request refund of EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding on TotalEnergies SE dividend for account 901234567
Reference FR-NO tax treaty Article 10 specifying 15% maximum withholding rate on dividends between France and Norway
Submit formal reclaim with custodian including treaty documentation and calculation showing correct net amount should be EUR 212,160.00
If custodian cannot process, initiate direct reclaim with French tax authorities for the overpaid withholding tax
